title: SHARLOVY 3'' Squeaky Balls for Small Dogs, 4 Colors Spiky Dog Balls for Puppy Teething, Durable Puppy Chew Toys for Teething, Indestructible Toys to Fetch and Train, BPA Free Non-Toxic
features: SUPER VALUE DOG TOY BALLS: 4 pack bouncy ball dog toys come in 4 vivid colors, blue, orange, red and green. It is worth getting these bouncing ball toys since they are multifunctional, combined all-in-one, just like you get teething toys, squeaky toys, toss and fetch toys for dogs at the same time

SAFE: Made of food grade, TPR, non-toxic, no chemical smell, provide the safest pet toys for your puppies. Spikes on the ball have a buffer and the built-in-sound design, ensuring that puppy can chew wantonly, and pet owners don't have to worry. The added benefit is helping to keep their gums and teeth cleaner, and it can be entertained for several hours

CLEANS TEETH AND IMPROVE ORAL HEALTH Specially designed for your beloved furry friend. This squeaky dog ball has flexible spikes, encourage dog to chew and condition teeth, promote healthier gum and tooth clean, and keep breath fresh. Helping to improve the health and life of their teeth and gums unknowingly. Feature a internal squeaker, hidden deeply, that means dogs are hardly to squeeze it out, no choking hazard when chewing or playing. Not too loud, but still get dogs’ attention

GREAT CHOICE FOR PETS: This bouncing dog toy ball can let dogs fall in love with sports, have a healthier lifestyle, and stop boredom. Let the puppy keep breath fresh and teeth healthy, and they can play all day with other dogs or alone. This is an ideal present especially suitable for any size dogs or dog lovers. Not for aggressive chewers since we choose the safest material not the strongest, we recommend supervised play, and timely replacement of the broken ones

SATISFACTION SERVICE: This unique squeaky ball toy with spikes is the perfect for large dog. The texture appearance and safe material will help teething puppy relieve gum pain. Choose one of 4 colors to match your dog's personality or favorite color. Please don't hesitate to contact us if there is any questions or concerns with your purchase
